long_desc: Some fermented beer in a cracked bottle is here.
A bottle of imported beer has been left here.
A dark bottle of stout malt liquor has been left here.
A bottle of Blasco's Revenge has been left here.
A dark bottle of Sally's Special has been left here.
A key made of a dull metal is lying on the ground here.

extra_descs.desc:
Lenses in the shape of rectangles, these orange-tinted mirrored sunglasses
are UV protected.

long_desc: A pair of orange-tinted, mirrored sunglasses sit here.

extra_descs.desc:
Colored in every shade under the rainbow, this robe is sure to attract
attention.

long_desc: A tie dyed robe sits here.

extra_descs.desc:
Round, rumpled, and covered in lures, this hat must have been someone's
favorite.

long_desc: A round fishing hat has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
The waybread is the traditional feed of elves when traveling, they call it
lembas.  It is said to refresh the weary traveler greatly.

long_desc: Some waybread has been put here.
Some dried rations has been left here.
A nice looking delicious red apple has been left here.
A tasty looking hoagie has been dropped here.
A shot of bourbon is here.

extra_descs.desc: They have cheese on them.  Looks like one of The Goat's specials.

long_desc: Some nachos have been left here.
A heaping chest of coins sits in the floor here.

extra_descs.desc:
It is a quite heavy but very comfortable bench.  It is placed with its front
towards the river so that you may enjoy the view of the river and all the shops
and homes on the opposite bank.

long_desc: A white painted bench is standing here.

extra_descs.desc: A golden broadsword, chain mail shirt, leggings, and helm rest on the rack.

long_desc: A golden, glowing rack of armor and weapons rests here against one wall.

extra_descs.desc:
****** THE KITTY KAT CLUB ******
                            fine dining and exotic entertainment

                             Ask for any of our dinner specials

                                          -OR-

                                if you are in the mood for
                           something a bit more on the WILD side,
                       try our upper lounge's wonderful facilities

long_desc: A menu from the Kitty Kat Club sits at your table.
A bag of gold coins sits here.
A dagger with a long thin blade is here.
A small sword lies here.
An aqua potion has been left here.
A simple looking wooden club is here.
A mace is here.
A large flail is here.
A dark, pin-striped suit sits here.
Some brass knuckles are here.
An un-smoked joint has been left here.
A pair of nose plugs attached to a head strap have been left here.
A large torch.
A brass lantern is here.
A small bag is here.
A backpack is here.
A shoe horn has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
It is a well crafted fountain, carved from a single piece of granite
beautifully rendered so to represent a feeling of victory.  It seems to be
enchanted in some manner, as the water level seems to never lower.

long_desc: A large fountain with a statue of a man holding a sword aloft dominates the town proper.  A single word - FREEDOM - is engraved into the base.
A sanitary footy sits on the ground.
A dirty glass of rye is here.
A glass of white wine is here.
A champagn glass sits on the ground.
A blue jacket is lying on the floor.
A pair of leather gloves lie here.
A small wooden shield is lying on the ground.
A pair of black leather pants lie on the ground.
short_desc: a pair of black leather pants

long_desc: A leather helm is lying on the ground.
A scale mail jacket is lying on the ground.
A bronze breast plate is lying on the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
The poster has no picture, only a short description:

                  REWARD!!!!
            WANTED DEAD OR ALIVE
  Karandon the Sly, alias Jacques the Jackal
Known to be fond of strong drink and women.  Wears
           black cloak and boots.

long_desc: A wanted poster hangs on the wall here.

extra_descs.desc:
The poster has no picture, only a short description:

                  REWARD!!!
            WANTED DEAD OR ALIVE
 Saracaphos Bejis, alias Harah the Horsemaster
Known horse thief and murderer.  Wears brown jacket
          and rawhide riding boots.

long_desc: A wanted poster hangs on the wall here.
A dustpan has been left here.

The scroll has a magic formula drawn upon it:

     ???
    ?   ?
       ?
      ?
      ?
      *

long_desc: A scroll has carelessly been left here.

extra_descs.desc: The potion has a small label 'Detect The Invisible'.

long_desc: A small yellow potion has carelessly been left here.
short_desc: a yellow potion of see invisible

extra_descs.desc: The scroll has written a formulae of 'Word of Recall' upon it.

long_desc: A scroll has carelessly been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
The wand is an old dark gray stick.  You notice a small symbol etched at
the base of the wand.  It looks like this:

     \ /
    - O -
     / \

long_desc: A gray wand has carelessly been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
The staff is made of old oak, and is around five feet long. It fits
perfectly into your hand. You notice a small symbol etched at the
base of the staff, it looks like:

  ZZZZZ
     Z
    Z
   Z
  ZZZZZ  z   z

long_desc: A gnarled staff has been carelessly abondoned.

extra_descs.desc: The staff is made of metals unknown to you.

long_desc: A metal staff has carelessly been left here.
A heap of gold coins.
A scroll has been left here.
A pile of deposit slips sit here on a table.
A pile of withdrawal slips sit here on a table.

extra_descs.desc: The raft looks very primitive.

long_desc: A raft has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
The canoe looks to be made from white ash.  A strong but light wood that can
be easily steamed into almost any shape.

long_desc: A canoe has been left here.
A row boat has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
You have got to be kidding!  No one would actually use this would they?
You are going to be the laughing stock of the realm if you ever use this thing.

long_desc: A floatation device has been left here.
A red lager has been left here.
A cup has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
Reading the tag in the back, you see that it was Made in Jareth, by Franz's
Clothier.

long_desc: A pair of bright green and yellow checkered pants has been left here.
A hot pink golfers cap with a ball in top rests in the ground.
A red satin shirt lays on the ground.
A pair of blue suede shoes are here.
short_desc: a pair of blue suede shoes

extra_descs.desc: Black, leather, with the fingers cut off, these gloves radiate power.

long_desc: A pair of black gloves have been left here.
A pair of low cut black boots are here.
A wagon sits here.
A hand cart sits here.
A carriage has been left here.
A tray of stale donuts sits here.
A syringe has been left here.
A beautiful regulation length pool table stands proudly in the center of the room.
Kaan's hot tub is sunk into the northeast corner of the room.
A canteen has been set on the ground here.

extra_descs.desc: Is that a booger on the end?  Yuck!

long_desc: Jacque the Jackal's pinky finger lies on the ground here.

extra_descs.desc:
This establishment will pay any being who gives blood a flat sum of gold in
return for their donation.  Simply GIVE BLOOD and you shall be rewarded.

long_desc: A sign hangs on the wall here.

extra_descs.desc:
House Rules
To wager coin, simple GAMBLE (AMT).
Be warned, chances are slim that you will be a winner!

long_desc: A sign hangs on the wall here.

extra_descs.desc: It's just an empty vial.

long_desc: An empty vial has been left here.
You see a piece of blank paper lying on the floor ...you might wish to write a note?

extra_descs.desc:
-Training Hall-

- To train a stat, type TRAIN (stat).  Cost will vary depending on player level.

long_desc: There is a sign hanging on the south wall.

extra_descs.desc:
-Library

-To train your intelligence or wisdom, simply type TRAIN (stat).

-AND KEEP YOUR VOICE DOWN!!!!!!!!!!

long_desc: There is a sign hanging on the wall here.
A large ruby lies on the ground, collecting dust.
A glittering diamond lies at your feet.
A brilliant sapphire lies here, twinkling happily.

An assortment of nuts and berries have been left here.

If you can read this, the drop box is not working.
